standard.overall: Large, heavy cat with a sweet expression and striking blue eyes.
standard.head: Broad, modified wedge with a flat plane between ears.

standard.overall: The 'Gentle Giant' of the cat world, large and rugged.
standard.head: Medium width, slightly longer than wide, distinct square muzzle.
standard.eyes: Large, expressive, set at a slight slant.
standard.ears: Large, tufted with lynx tips, set high.
standard.body: Muscular, broad chest, long rectangular body.
standard.coat: Heavy, shaggy, shorter on shoulders and longer on stomach.

standard.overall: Elegant, long-haired cat with a sweet, round face.
standard.head: Round and massive with a short, broad snub nose.
standard.coat: Long, thick, fine texture with a large ruff.

standard.overall: The 'Persian in pajamas' - sweet and round like a Persian but with a short coat.
standard.head: Massive, round head with a flat face.
standard.ears: Small, rounded, set low and wide.
standard.coat: Short, dense, plush, standing away from body.
standard.personality: Quiet, affectionate, and more active than Persians.

standard.overall: Pixie-like appearance with large ears and a curly coat.
standard.head: Modified wedge with prominent cheekbones and a strong chin.
standard.ears: Strikingly large, set low, very wide at the base.
standard.body: Slender, hard and muscular, medium length.
standard.coat: Short, fine, wavy or curly, soft texture.

standard.overall: A compact, powerful, and balanced cat often called a 'Teddy Bear'.
standard.head: Round and massive with chubby cheeks.
standard.ears: Medium size, broad at the base, rounded tips.
standard.body: Medium to large, stocky and sturdy.
standard.coat: Short, very dense, crisp and resilient.
